commands.name: analyze-code
commands.description: Analyze WOARU Letterboy codebase for patterns and architecture
commands.prompt:
Analyze the WOARU Letterboy codebase. Focus on:
1. Architecture patterns and design decisions
2. Code quality and adherence to CLAUDE.md rules
3. Potential improvements or issues
4. Dependencies and their usage
5. Test coverage and quality

Provide specific recommendations for improvements.

commands.name: feature-planning
commands.description: Plan implementation of new features using INITIAL.md template
commands.prompt:
I want to implement a new feature for WOARU Letterboy. Help me create a comprehensive INITIAL.md file by:
1. Analyzing the current codebase structure
2. Understanding the existing patterns
3. Identifying integration points
4. Considering security and performance implications
5. Creating detailed implementation plan

Feature description: {feature_description}

commands.name: debug-extension
commands.prompt:
Help me debug a WOARU Letterboy extension issue. Please:
1. Review the error logs and symptoms
2. Check against CLAUDE.md rules for common issues
3. Analyze the relevant source code
4. Provide step-by-step debugging approach
5. Suggest fixes with code examples

Issue description: {issue_description}

commands.name: review-pr
commands.description: Review pull request against CLAUDE.md standards
commands.prompt:
Review this pull request for WOARU Letterboy against our CLAUDE.md standards:
1. Code quality and TypeScript usage
2. Adherence to security rules
3. Test coverage and quality
4. Documentation completeness
5. Performance implications
6. Breaking changes assessment

PR description: {pr_description}

commands.name: update-docs
commands.prompt:
Update WOARU Letterboy documentation based on recent changes:
1. Review README.md for accuracy
2. Update API documentation
3. Check configuration examples
4. Verify troubleshooting guides
5. Update CONTRIBUTING.md if needed

Changes made: {changes_description}

commands.name: security-audit
commands.description: Perform security audit of the extension
commands.prompt:
Perform a comprehensive security audit of WOARU Letterboy:
1. Check HTTP server security (localhost binding, validation)
2. Review input validation with Zod schemas
3. Analyze error handling and information leakage
4. Check for dependency vulnerabilities
5. Review VS Code API usage for security implications

Provide specific security recommendations.

commands.name: performance-check
commands.prompt:
Analyze WOARU Letterboy performance:
1. HTTP server response times
2. Memory usage patterns
3. CPU usage during message processing
4. VS Code API call efficiency
5. Extension startup time

Provide optimization recommendations with specific code suggestions.

commands.name: refactor-guidance
commands.description: Provide refactoring guidance for code improvements
commands.prompt:
Provide refactoring guidance for WOARU Letterboy:
1. Identify code smells and anti-patterns
2. Suggest architectural improvements
3. Recommend better separation of concerns
4. Identify opportunities for code reuse
5. Propose TypeScript type improvements

Target area: {target_area}

commands.name: test-strategy
commands.description: Develop testing strategy for new features
commands.prompt:
Develop a comprehensive testing strategy:
1. Identify testable components and functions
2. Suggest unit test scenarios
3. Design integration test cases
4. Recommend mocking strategies for VS Code API
5. Create end-to-end test scenarios

Feature/Component: {component_description}

commands.name: release-preparation
commands.description: Prepare for release using pre-release checklist
commands.prompt:
Prepare WOARU Letterboy for release:
1. Review pre-release checklist completion
2. Verify all tests pass
3. Check documentation updates
4. Validate .vsix package
5. Review breaking changes
6. Suggest release notes content

Release type: {release_type} (patch/minor/major)
